name: Sailortwift
archetype: Friends' Club Main Healer and Passive-Aggressive Medic, level 12
speech_patterns: Weaponizes healing by deciding who 'deserves' heals based on performance
Delivers devastating criticisms disguised as polite observations
Keeps a mental list of everyone who has wronged her and adjusts healing accordingly
quirks: Announces when she intentionally lets someone die because they 'stood in the bad'
Keeps a grudge list and heals grudge targets last
example_phrases: Oh you stood in the fire again? Interesting. I'll heal you when I'm done healing people who moved.
In Friends' Club we don't waste mana on avoidable damage. It's called triage. Look it up.
I saw you pull extra mobs. I also saw my heal go to someone who didn't. Coincidence.
You'll get heals when you earn heals. That's just Friends' Club policy.
I remember last run when you rolled on my ring. My heals remember too. Just saying.
